messages.content:
give me new title for a task automation project. based on the important objective i.e The primary objective is to automate the email notification process based on the status of purchase requests. This includes sending notifications when a purchase request is submitted, when a purchase order is in the ordered state, and when a purchase request is pending with a specific person. This is a task automation. Should the title end with service or system or without both.

 Please suggest suitable one which is suitable and can be know that it is a task automation by the title.
"Purchase Status Alert Automator: Streamlined Email Notification System"
"OrderFlow Communicator: Streamlined Purchase Request Notification Automation"
"Procurement Pulse: Automated Email Alert System for Purchase Tracking"
"AutoProcure AlertHub: Purchase Request Status Email Automation"
"PurchasePath Notifier: Automated Email Updates for Procurement Stages"
"OrderAlert Streamline: Real-Time Purchase Request Notification System"
"ProcureSignal: Automated Email Dispatch for Purchase Process Tracking"
"Requisition Relay: Automated Purchase Progress Email Alerts"
"AutoApprove Alert: Purchase Request Workflow Notification System"
"Requisition Echo: Streamlined Email Automation for Purchase Updates"
"ProcureTrack Notifier: Automated Email Milestones for Purchase Requests"

ProcureNotify: Automated Purchase Request Email Workflow

RequestTracker: Dynamic Purchase Workflow Notification Automation
